scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:components
scripts.test:contracts: node tests/appScope.test.mjs && node tests/apiClient.test.mjs && node tests/mobileRoutes.test.mjs && node tests/mobileApi.test.mjs && node tests/iosNativeContract.test.mjs && node tests/clubActivity.test.mjs && node tests/communityTrust.test.mjs && node tests/memberExperience.test.mjs && node tests/mobileUiContract.test.mjs && node tests/adminLight.test.mjs && node tests/postBlocks.test.mjs && node tests/pollDraft.test.mjs && node tests/passwordPolicy.test.mjs && node tests/version.test.mjs && node tests/markdown.test.mjs && node tests/preferences.test.mjs && node tests/nativeErrorLogging.test.mjs && node tests/accountActions.test.mjs && node tests/deviceStorage.test.mjs && node tests/urlValidation.test.mjs && node tests/responseSchemas.test.mjs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
